name: Security group allows unrestricted RDP access (0.0.0.0/0)
description: A security group has an inbound rule allowing RDP (TCP/3389) access from any IP address. This exposes Windows instances to BlueKeep, DejaBlue, and credential stuffing attacks over the internet.
remediation: Restrict RDP access to known management IPs. Use AWS Systems Manager Fleet Manager (RDP over SSM) to eliminate the need for an open inbound RDP port entirely.
